addresses.description: Defines the physical or postal addresses associated with the user, including type, format, and constraints as required by the identity store.
addresses.type: list(object({country: optional(string),formatted: optional(string),locality: optional(string),postal_code: optional(string),primary: optional(bool),region: optional(string),street_address: optional(string),type: optional(string)}))

display_name.description: The name displayed for the user, typically used for identification purposes; must be unique within the identity store.

emails.description: List of email addresses associated with the user, including at least one primary email; required for user creation.

identity_store_id.description: The identifier of the AWS Identity Store associated with the user, required for managing user resources.

locale.description: Specifies the user's locale, typically in the format of a language code followed by a country code (e.g., "en_US"). Must comply with ISO 639-1 and ISO 3166-1 standards.

name.description: Specifies the user's display name, which is required and must be unique within the identity store.
name.type: list(object({family_name: string,formatted: optional(string),given_name: string,honorific_prefix: optional(string),honorific_suffix: optional(string),middle_name: optional(string)}))

nickname.description: Specifies the nickname for the user, typically used as a casual or informal name.

phone_numbers.description: List of phone numbers associated with the user, each entry must include type and value attributes.

preferred_language.description: Specifies the user's preferred language for communication, typically formatted as a language tag (e.g., "en-US").

profile_url.description: URL of the user's profile, typically used for referencing external user details; must be a valid URL format.

timezone.description: Specifies the user's timezone in IANA format (e.g., "America/New_York"); must be a valid timezone identifier.

title.description: The user's title or designation within the organization.

user_name.description: Specifies the unique name of the user within the identity store; must meet the naming conventions of the identity provider.

user_type.description: Specifies the type of user, such as employee or contractor, within the identity store.
